section_name: Penalty for Compensating Certain Unlawful Actions
chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) A person commits an offense if the person:

(1) provides compensation to another for the movement of a manufactured home over a highway, road, or street in this state; and

(2) knows the other person is not authorized by law to move the home.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of $1,000.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.105 — Penalty for Compensating Certain Unlawful Actions

(a) A person commits an offense if the person:

    (1) provides compensation to another for the movement of a manufactured home over a highway, road, or street in this state; and

    (2) knows the other person is not authorized by law to move the home.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of $1,000.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 338, Sec. 49, eff. June 18, 2003.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A person commits an offense if the person:
provides compensation to another for the movement of a manufactured home over a highway, road, or street in this state; and
knows the other person is not authorized by law to move the home.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of $1,000.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 338, Sec. 49, eff. June 18, 2003.
